testcase.name: testSubscriberToPublisherPipeline
testcase.system-out: 15:45:16.989 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-1' 등록됨 15:45:17.310 [MQTT Call: sub-1-1776753916987] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] MQTT Broker 연결 완료 15:45:17.311 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.ProtocolNode -- [sub] 연결 성공 15:45:17.315 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttPublisherNode -- [pub] MQTT Broker(tcp://localhost:1883) 연결 시도 15:45:17.632 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttPublisherNode -- [pub] MQTT Broker 연결 완료 (Publisher) 15:45:17.633 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.ProtocolNode -- [pub] 연결 성공 15:45:17.633 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-1' 시작됨 [transform] processing message [pub] processing message 15:45:19.145 [MQTT Call: sub-1-1776753916987] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] 메시지 수신 및 전송 완료: Message(id=8980c7e8-c4a2-427f-803b-1beb5c6c0215, payload={data=123, topic=test/in, mqttTimestamp=1776753919145}, timestamp=1776753919145)

testcase.name: testMultiTopicSubscription
testcase.system-out: 15:45:19.778 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-2' 등록됨 15:45:20.097 [MQTT Call: sub-2-1776753919778] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] MQTT Broker 연결 완료 15:45:20.098 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.ProtocolNode -- [sub] 연결 성공 15:45:20.099 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-2' 시작됨 [collector] processing message 15:45:21.610 [MQTT Call: sub-2-1776753919778] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] 메시지 수신 및 전송 완료: Message(id=9318b4d0-4228-4e86-bd73-cf9c032bb6c4, payload={value=20, topic=multi_test_1776753919777/temp, mqttTimestamp=1776753921610}, timestamp=1776753921610) 15:45:21.611 [MQTT Call: sub-2-1776753919778] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] 메시지 수신 및 전송 완료: Message(id=0aaf84ad-f502-4487-a108-f692b38521b3, payload={value=50, topic=multi_test_1776753919777/humidity, mqttTimestamp=1776753921611}, timestamp=1776753921611) [collector] processing message

testcase.name: testQos1DeliveryGuarantee
testcase.system-out: 15:45:24.151 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-3' 등록됨 15:45:24.473 [MQTT Call: sub-3-1776753924151] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode testcase.name: testReconnection
testcase.system-out: 15:45:28.532 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-4' 등록됨 15:45:28.855 [MQTT Call: sub-4-1776753928531] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] MQTT Broker 연결 완료 15:45:28.856 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.ProtocolNode -- [sub] 연결 성공 15:45:28.857 [main] INFO com.fbp.engine.core.FlowEngine -- [Engine] 플로우 'flow-4' 시작됨 [collector] processing message 15:45:30.364 [MQTT Call: sub-4-1776753928531] INFO com.fbp.engine.node.impl.MqttSubscriberNode -- [sub] 메시지 수신 및 전송 완료: Message(id=ccac37e6-8021-4773-b33d-2af143e343c7, payload={topic=reconnect/test, mqttTimestamp=1776753930364, status=ok}, timestamp=1776753930364)
